name: BANC OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
business: Banc of California provides banking and treasury management services to small, middle-market, and venture-backed businesses, along with loan and deposit products, payment processing solutions, and a technology-forward platform for the Community Association Management industry.

exposures.sentence: The Company’s Payments business provides integrated electronic payment capabilities for commercial clients, including merchant acquiring and card issuing services.
Increasingly, community banks, including the Bank, are partnering with fintech providers to distribute or market their products and services.
Our cybersecurity measures may not be sufficient to mitigate losses or exposure to cyber-attack or cyber theft.
The development and use of new technologies, including artificial intelligence (AI), presents risks and challenges that may adversely impact our business.
